action.reasoning: Observation: predict.py already has weights_only=False. The FileNotFoundError was because I tested with /data which doesn't have test_x.npy - that's expected. The eval harness will provide the correct test_data_dir with test_x.npy. The checkpoint from iter 2 (5 epochs, val MAE 3.05) should work. Decision: Submit eval to get baseline score, then train for more epochs.
